prompt: Create a cinematic widescreen science-fiction scene in a 16:9 frame with black letterbox bars, showing an anthropomorphic blue falcon pilot seated in the cockpit of a futuristic starfighter. The character is a realistic 3D game-style avian ace with vivid blue feathers, a red crest and red facial plumage, a large yellow hooked beak, and a calm focused expression, looking slightly to the right as if scanning the sky. Give the pilot a compact cybernetic headset with a glowing green monocle lens over one eye, small metal ear pieces, and a microphone boom. Dress the character in a detailed silver and white sci-fi flight jacket with shoulder armor, harness straps, patches, zipper details, and a red neck scarf. The cockpit surrounds the pilot with dark angular canopy frames, glass reflections, padded seat, control panels, small multicolored indicator lights, and a visible flight stick or console in the lower right. Outside the canopy, show blurred blue aircraft wings and bright sky with soft clouds, implying high-speed flight. Use dramatic natural daylight, shallow depth of field, glossy realistic materials, high-detail feathers, cinematic color grading, sharp foreground focus, and the look of a premium playable browser game cutscene or next-generation space racing asset.
